maxPagesPerTask.title: Max pages per task
maxPagesPerTask.description: Max listing pages per parallel task. 8 tasks run in parallel covering pages 0–8000. Each page returns ~20 ads.

pageSizeApi.title: Page size (ads per API request)
pageSizeApi.description: Number of listings returned per API page.

minRequestDelay.title: Min delay between requests (seconds)
minRequestDelay.description: Minimum pause between API calls per task.

maxRequestDelay.title: Max delay between requests (seconds)
maxRequestDelay.description: Maximum pause between API calls per task.

writeInterval.title: Write interval (pages)
writeInterval.description: Push results to dataset every N pages per task.
